data.body: Replace vague 'Profile variant: ... if the knot profile expects it' language in skills/*.md with {{ output }} template variables and output-mode-specific sections. Affected files: skills/implementation.md, skills/shipment.md, skills/shipment_review.md, skills/implementation_review.md. For remote_main: explicit merge-to-main and push instructions, no PR references. For pr: explicit PR creation/update instructions. Keep existing step boundary, invariant, commit tagging, and write-constraint sections unchanged.
data.title: Update skills prompts with delivery-target-explicit language
